channel.title: Gallery CCTV on The Security Gazette
channel.description: Recent content in Gallery CCTV on The Security Gazette

item.title: CCTV for Museums and Galleries — Protecting Exhibits and Visitors UK 2026
item.description: Expert guidance on CCTV for museums, galleries, and exhibition spaces: discreet surveillance options, heritage building compliance, and the balance between security and visitor experience.
